infinite-scroll._comment: OrigamInfiniteScroll + OrigamInfiniteScrollIntersect component tokens — Lot 5D. Scroll container with intersection-based load triggers. BEM children: side (top/bottom loading zones), loader slot, empty slot, loadMore slot. Note: <v-*> Vuetify usages (OrigamInfiniteScroll uses OrigamProgress and OrigamBtn inline) are kept as-is per Lot 5D spec — no bug fix applied to Vuetify legacy patterns.

loader._comment: Tokens for the loading indicator slot displayed while new content is fetching.

color.$description: Color passed to OrigamProgress spinner (circular indeterminate) in the loading slot

gap.$description: Gap between the loader and adjacent elements within the __side zone

padding-block.$description: Block padding of the __side container hosting the loader

font-size.$description: Font size for any text accompanying the loading indicator

empty._comment: Tokens for the empty-state slot shown when no more items are available.

color.$description: Text color for the empty state message (subdued, secondary)

padding-block.$description: Block padding around the empty state text
